home.metaTitle: CS2Hideout — The Hideout Marketplace for CS2 Traders
home.metaDesc: Community-first CS2 skin trading & deal discovery for Southeast Asia. Zero fees. Buy, sell, trade.
home.heroSub: Buy, Sell, Trade — Zero Fees. Ever.

market.metaDesc: Browse CS2 skin listings across SEA. Sell, trade, or both. Zero fees.
market.title: Marketplace
market.subtitle: {count} active listings · Zero fees · Trades happen directly on Steam
market.emptySub: Try widening your search — there's always a deal somewhere.

skinDetail.notFoundSub: It may have been sold or removed.
skinDetail.shield: CS2Hideout never touches your items. Trade happens directly on Steam.

create.title: Post a listing
create.subtitle: Three quick steps. We never touch your items — buyers reach out via Steam directly.
create.notesPlaceholder: Open to offers, low float, etc.
create.step2: What do you want for it?
create.tradeUrlHelpStrong: Steam → Inventory → Trade Offers → Who can send me trade offers
create.tradeUrlHelpPost: . We'll save it to your profile so you only enter it once.
create.agree: By posting, you agree to keep trades respectful and on-Steam. Off-platform scams are reported and banned immediately.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Where SEA traders hang out, post deals, and talk skins.

matches.metaDesc: Live, upcoming, and completed CS2 matches — Bangkok time.
matches.title: Match Hub
matches.subtitle: All times shown in Bangkok (GMT+7).
matches.empty: No matches in this view yet — check back soon.

premium.metaDesc: Unlock real-time alerts, early listings, advanced filters and more.
premium.subtitle: The serious trader's edge. Built for SEA, priced fairly, and locked in for founding members.
premium.founders: ★ First 500 members lock in this price forever
features: Early access to new listings (15 min before public)
Advanced deal filters (float range, pattern index)
Price history charts (90 days vs 30 days free)

login.title: Welcome back, trader
login.subtitle: Sign in with Steam — we never see your password, and we never touch your items.

footer.tagline: Community-built. Zero fees. Just traders helping traders find great deals across SEA.
